summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tender documents, evaluate eligibility of bidders, and produce explainable evaluation reports for government procurement. The system follows a neuro-symbolic architecture where AI handles document understanding, extraction, and anomaly detection while all eligibility determinations are performed by deterministic rule-based logic.
optimization_claims: Eliminating five systemic failures in government procurement
No bidder is ever automatically or silently disqualified
Full evidence chain for every evaluation outcome
